summary: The 06 §2.1 measurement-source map: which boot stage / software component feeds each TeeEvidence measurement, and the order the extend-only chain folds them. Bound field-by-field to the canonical agent type at packages/agent/src/services/tee-evidence.ts (NOT packages/core/src/types/tee.ts; see tee-plan/07 §0 drift correction) and to the folding implemented by scripts/tee/teeevidence_quote.py. This is a contract, not silicon evidence: every entry is a planned source whose real digest is BLOCKED on the named hardware/firmware lane.
claim_boundary: Measurement-source map only; not a measured launch, not secure boot, not a signed quote, not silicon. Each measurement's real digest is BLOCKED on the named lane until that lane produces a transcript.
report_data_binding: sha256:H(nonce || ephemeral_pubkey) binds the quote to the live RA-TLS channel (06 §3.1, 07 §7.1).

measurements.fold: extend-only over rom, lifecycle, BL1, BL2 (teeevidence_quote.fold_boot_measurement)
measurements.blocked_on: fw/boot-rom/secure constant-time Ed25519 + measurement extend (R2/R3); RoT silicon

measurements.produced_by: TSM-driver measures the TSM (security-manager) image at load
measurements.blocked_on: M-mode CoVE TSM bring-up (06 WI-6); rtl/security/e1_tsm_epmp_wall.sv (C4)

measurements.produced_by: TSM measures guest kernel + initramfs + dtb (+ rootfs) into the TVM measurement register
measurements.blocked_on: reproducible guest image build (06 WI-3); confidential-boot smoke (06 WI-6)

measurements.produced_by: TSM measures the in-domain policy blob (page/IO/debug policy)
measurements.blocked_on: in-domain policy blob materialization at finalize

measurements.produced_by: in-domain attestation agent hashes the elizaOS agent image at first run; extends a runtime measurement log
measurements.blocked_on: in-domain attestation agent (06a-attestation-agent-spec.md), runtime measurement log

measurements.produced_by: NPU runtime hashes loaded NPU firmware + queue-policy blob before private-queue ownership

measurements.required_when: private-inference unseal binds the weights digest
measurements.produced_by: in-domain runtime hashes the at-rest sealed-weights plaintext; bound as the modelWeights policy measurement at key release
measurements.blocked_on: confidential-inference unseal path on real silicon

claims.name: secureBoot
claims.set_by: TSM + RoT: true only when the boot chain verified end-to-end

claims.name: debugDisabled
claims.set_by: lifecycle: true only when lifecycle==LOCKED and debug ports gated

claims.name: memoryEncrypted
claims.set_by: MCIE: true only when AES-CTR + integrity tree active on the domain's private pages

claims.name: ioProtected
claims.set_by: IOMMU/IOPMP: true only when source-ID policy programmed and IOMMU not in BARE for the domain

claims.name: npuProtected
claims.set_by: NPU runtime: true only when NPU fw measured + private-queue ownership held + counter guard active

claims.name: monitorMeasured
claims.set_by: TSM-driver: true only when the M-mode TSM image was measured into the monitor register and DICE chain
